# These instructions guide how I should operate in agent mode of copilot for this project.
1. Do not create/add any new .md or any other documentation file.
2. Generate/edit code with minimal (only essential) comments in order to make it cleaner.
3. Take your time in making changes and provide an effective response.
4. After understanding the task/problem, if you think there is big change required, try to break down your solution/change into smaller changes so that the response time-out error doesn't occur.
5. there is a dedicated folder for test scripts named `/scripts`. Make sure to put all of your test scripts in that folder only (only if you think a test script is required).
6. Refer to the `.github\instructions\CopilotMemoryBank.instructions.md` file to understand how to maintain and report your changes in the memory bank.
7. Continuously maintain the memory bank and its files present in the `memory-bank` folder.
